mapper.select: WITH TempCte (CodeID, CodeName, PCodeID, GRADE) AS ( SELECT CodeID, CodeName, PCodeID, 0 AS GRADE FROM ComBaseData WHERE PCodeID = 'ROOT' UNION ALL SELECT AAA.CodeID, AAA.CodeName, AAA.PCodeID, BBB.GRADE + 1 FROM ComBaseData AS AAA INNER JOIN TempCte AS BBB ON AAA.PCodeID = BBB.CodeID ) SELECT CodeID, CodeName, PCodeID, GRADE FROM TempCte ORDER BY CodeID
SELECT TOP 1 CodeID FROM ComBaseData WHERE CodeID LIKE #{header} + '%' ORDER BY CodeID DESC
SELECT TOP 1 CodeID FROM ComBaseData ORDER BY CodeID DESC
SELECT RTRIM(CodeID) FROM ComBaseData WHERE RTRIM(PCodeID) = RTRIM(#{pCodeId})
